goal: Document Day-1 setup, extract prompt templates, create Qdrant initialization script, and provide smoke tests
summary: Phase 3 complete. Created scripts/setup_qdrant.py to initialize three Qdrant collections (github_issues, discord_unmatched, pending_issues) with 1536-dim Cosine vectors and payload indexes. Extracted two LLM judge prompt templates into prompts/ as standalone markdown files. Wrote comprehensive README.md with architecture diagram, prerequisites, environment variables, setup instructions for Discord/Kestra/Qdrant/Worker, deployment steps, operational notes, and curl smoke-test examples. Added executable tests/smoke.sh. Committed all deliverables to git with a proper .gitignore.
stepSummaries:
1. Create Qdrant setup script to initialize github_issues, discord_unmatched, and pending_issues collections with correct vector dimensions (1536 for text-embedding-3-small) [verified]
  2. Extract and commit LLM judge Prompt A (GitHub match) and Prompt B (cluster match) as standalone markdown templates in prompts/ [verified]
  3. Write comprehensive README with architecture overview, prerequisites, environment variables, Discord/Kestra/Qdrant setup, deployment steps, and operational notes [verified]
  4. Add smoke test commands: curl example for relay webhook and curl example for Discord interaction approval webhook [verified]
  5. Final review: verify all expected deliverable files exist and are committed in the repository [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Steps 1-5 combine proxy file checks (test -s, test -f, grep) with syntactic verification (AST parse for Python, js-yaml for YAMLs implied by prior phases, git commit for repo state). Step 1 AST parse validates Python syntax. No step relied solely on proxy verification for semantic logic without supporting syntactic or real action checks.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1: python3 ast.parse confirms syntax. Step 5: git commit captures repository state with 20 files at 2517 insertions.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase 3 goal was to document Day-1 setup, extract prompt templates, create Qdrant initialization script, and provide smoke tests. Delivered: setup_qdrant.py (idempotent collection initializer), two prompt markdowns, README with full architecture/setup/deployment/operations, and smoke.sh with curl examples. All committed to git.
gateVerdicts.evidence: scripts/setup_qdrant.py, prompts/*.md, README.md, tests/smoke.sh all exist and are committed. git log shows single commit with all deliverables.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred in Phase 3. All five steps completed successfully. Remaining future work (runtime Kestra execution, end-to-end testing, actual deployment) is outside the scope of this phase and was already identified as Phase 4+ work in prior phase gates.
gateVerdicts.evidence: All steps in phase-3 are done and verified (✓1 through ✓5).
